'''鈭歞h-g-y''' ('''kadhagay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:youngify|youngify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:youngify|youngify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-g-y
|-
! Lemma
| kadhagay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhagay|thidhagay]] || [[word:jidhagay|jidhagay]] || [[word:shidhagay|shidhagay]] || [[word:kidhagay|kidhagay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhagay|thuthudhagay]] || [[word:jujudhagay|jujudhagay]] || [[word:shushudhagay|shushudhagay]] || [[word:kukudhagay|kukudhagay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhagay|thudhagay]] || [[word:judhagay|judhagay]] || [[word:shudhagay|shudhagay]] || [[word:kudhagay|kudhagay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhagay|thudhagay]] || [[word:judhagay|judhagay]] || [[word:shudhagay|shudhagay]] || [[word:kudhagay|kudhagay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhagay|thedhagay]] || [[word:jedhagay|jedhagay]] || [[word:shedhagay|shedhagay]] || [[word:kedhagay|kedhagay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhagay|thothodhagay]] || [[word:jojodhagay|jojodhagay]] || [[word:shoshodhagay|shoshodhagay]] || [[word:kokodhagay|kokodhagay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhagay|thodhagay]] || [[word:jodhagay|jodhagay]] || [[word:shodhagay|shodhagay]] || [[word:kodhagay|kodhagay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhagay|thodhagay]] || [[word:jodhagay|jodhagay]] || [[word:shodhagay|shodhagay]] || [[word:kodhagay|kodhagay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]] || [[word:dhagay|dhagay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhagay|th忙dhagay]] || [[word:j忙dhagay|j忙dhagay]] || [[word:sh忙dhagay|sh忙dhagay]] || [[word:k忙dhagay|k忙dhagay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhagay|thathadhagay]] || [[word:jajadhagay|jajadhagay]] || [[word:shashadhagay|shashadhagay]] || [[word:kakadhagay|kakadhagay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhagay|thadhagay]] || [[word:jadhagay|jadhagay]] || [[word:shadhagay|shadhagay]] || [[word:kadhagay|kadhagay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhagay|thadhagay]] || [[word:jadhagay|jadhagay]] || [[word:shadhagay|shadhagay]] || [[word:kadhagay|kadhagay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhagay|shadhagay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhagay|goshadhagay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhagay|gokishadhagay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhagayn眉|shadhagayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkn眉|goshadhagaynkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhagayn眉|gokishadhagayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhagaysh毛|shadhagaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhagaynksh毛|goshadhagaynksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhagaysh毛|gokishadhagaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhagayro|shadhagayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkro|goshadhagaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhagayro|gokishadhagayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhagaymu|shadhagaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkmu|goshadhagaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhagaymu|gokishadhagaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhagaysher|shadhagaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhagaynksher|goshadhagaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhagaysher|gokishadhagaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhagayng|shadhagayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkng|goshadhagaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhagayng|gokishadhagayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhagayya|shadhagayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkya|goshadhagaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhagayya|gokishadhagayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhagayyam|shadhagayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkyam|goshadhagaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhagayyam|gokishadhagayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhagayn眉sh毛|shadhagayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkn眉sh毛|goshadhagaynkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhagayn眉sh毛|gokishadhagayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhagayn眉ro|shadhagayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkn眉ro|goshadhagaynkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhagayn眉ro|gokishadhagayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhagayn眉mu|shadhagayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkn眉mu|goshadhagaynkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhagayn眉mu|gokishadhagayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhagaysh毛n眉|shadhagaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhagaynksh毛n眉|goshadhagaynksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhagaysh毛n眉|gokishadhagaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhagaysh毛ro|shadhagaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhagaynksh毛ro|goshadhagaynksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhagaysh毛ro|gokishadhagaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhagaysh毛mu|shadhagaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhagaynksh毛mu|goshadhagaynksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhagaysh毛mu|gokishadhagaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhagayron眉|shadhagayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkron眉|goshadhagaynkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhagayron眉|gokishadhagayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhagayrosh毛|shadhagayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkrosh毛|goshadhagaynkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhagayrosh毛|gokishadhagayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhagayromu|shadhagayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkromu|goshadhagaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhagayromu|gokishadhagayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhagaymun眉|shadhagaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkmun眉|goshadhagaynkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhagaymun眉|gokishadhagaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhagaymush毛|shadhagaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkmush毛|goshadhagaynkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhagaymush毛|gokishadhagaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhagaymuro|shadhagaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhagaynkmuro|goshadhagaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhagaymuro|gokishadhagaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
